game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **TVスタジオ物語**: Players manage a TV studio, creating programs by selecting a genre, theme, and studio, then assigning talent and arranging set pieces on a grid-based studio layout. The core loop involves producing programs, which requires choosing from available genres and themes, casting hosts and talents with specific skill ratings (e.g., Talk Skill 1-100), and strategically placing art sets to boost "studio atmosphere" points. Program quality, determined by the synergy of genre, theme, talent, and set design, directly influences viewership ratings (0-100%), with successful broadcasts generating "SNS buzz" points that attract new fans. Progression involves unlocking new genres, themes, set pieces, and higher-tier talent through "research" points earned from successful programs or by achieving station rank milestones. Difficulty scales as the studio expands, demanding more complex program strategies to maintain high ratings.
game_info.description: Manage your own TV studio and create hit programs! Select genres and themes, cast talented hosts, and design studio sets to boost ratings. Each program you produce earns viewership ratings and SNS buzz, which unlock new content and talent. Balance talent skills with set design to create synergy and achieve high ratings. Reach 1000 fans to win by producing successful shows and building your studio empire!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and move cursor in studio layout
Space: Confirm selection / Place set piece
Z: Cancel / Go back
Shift: Toggle between planning modes (Genre/Theme → Talent → Set Design)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to title screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game mechanics including navigation through menus, selecting genres/themes, assigning talent, and placing set pieces. Validates that the game responds correctly to inputs and state transitions occur as expected.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through all menu options using arrow keys and space. Select random genres, themes, and talent. Place a few set pieces in the studio. Produce a program and verify the game progresses through all phases correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Game successfully cycles through all production phases without errors. Program is produced and ratings are calculated. Game state updates correctly and player can continue producing more programs.

TEST_1.strategy: Navigate through all menu options using arrow keys and space. Select random genres, themes, and talent. Place a few set pieces in the studio. Produce a program and verify the game progresses through all phases correctly.
TEST_1.expected: Game successfully cycles through all production phases without errors. Program is produced and ratings are calculated. Game state updates correctly and player can continue producing more programs.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal winning strategy by producing high-quality programs that maximize ratings and fan growth. Validates that accumulating 1000+ fans triggers the win condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Strategically select genre-theme combinations with high synergy. Choose the best available talent with highest skills for each program. Place set pieces to maximize studio atmosphere points. Focus on consistent high ratings to rapidly accumulate fans and reach the win threshold.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player accumulates 1000+ fans through successful program production. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Win screen displays with final statistics and restart option.
